title: podman update container all options v2 tests failing
body:
tests(podman update container all options v2)  can be found :
https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/232179ae988a2fc7c1b358f1cc529ad28929d755/test/e2e/update_test.go#L144
`cpu.weight` should be able to accept new value as well as old ones so
1. test will continue to succeed 
2. old tests on crun can pass

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
